app_details.name: Taskr
app_details.hero_subheadline: Organize, prioritize, and track your work effortlessly

features.title: Simple Task Creation
features.description: Add tasks in seconds with our intuitive interface

features.title: Smart Filtering
features.description: View all, active, or completed tasks with one click

features.title: Drag & Drop Reordering
features.description: Prioritize tasks by simply dragging them around

features.title: Local Storage
features.description: Your tasks are saved automatically, even after closing the browser
